name: python3-gmplot
title: python3-gmplot
summary: matplotlib-like interface to plotting data with Google Maps (python3)
description:
matplotlib-like interface to plotting data with Google Maps (python3)
Plotting data on Google Maps, the easy way. A matplotlib-like interface to
generate the HTML and javascript to render all the data you’d like on top of
Google Maps. Several plotting methods make creating exploratory map views
effortless.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-gmplot because matplotlib-like interface to plotting data with Google Maps (python3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-gmplot as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-gmplot with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-gmplot --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
